name: csharp-lsp
description: pwiz C# LSP via Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.LanguageServer (Roslyn LSP from the VS Code C# extension). Workspace is ${PWIZ_LSP_DIR} (the full pwiz_tools path), falling back to ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/pwiz/pwiz_tools when PWIZ_LSP_DIR is unset. Multi-checkout (named sibling clones, no 'pwiz' folder) developers set PWIZ_LSP_DIR per session; see ai/scripts/lsp/Enable-PwizLsp.ps1.
